data.title: Sterling Schedules 2026 First Quarter Release and Conference Call
data.description: Sterling Infrastructure, Inc. (NasdaqGS: STRL), based in The Woodlands, Texas, is set to release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Monday, May 4, 2026, after the closing of the stock market. The Company announced its upcoming plans, providing stakeholders and investors with an insight into its performance for the quarter.
First Community Corporation Announces First Quarter Results and Cash Dividend

data.title: Accelerating Momentum in Clinical Use and Customer Growth for Atraverse Medical's HOTWIRE™ Transseptal Access System
data.description: New data has confirmed the safety and effectiveness of Atraverse Medical's left-heart access technology, with a significant reduction in radiofrequency delivery. The company will be presenting its system at HRS 2026, Booth 2410 in San Diego. This announcement comes as the company continues to showcase consistent performance across various workflows. These findings highlight the positive impact of the technology, further solidifying Atraverse Medical's position as a leader in the field.

data.title: DR.G EXPANDS INTO THE U.S. WITH NEW INNOVATIVE SKINCARE LAUNCHES, BRINGING K-BEAUTY DERMATOLOGICAL EXPERTISE TO A GLOBAL STAGE
data.description: A top skincare company from South Korea has launched new hydration, brightening, and at-home peeling products for consumers in the United States. Dr.G, the No.1 dermocosmetic brand in Korea, revealed this move in New York on April 22, 2026. The brand is introducing advanced skincare solutions to U.S. markets, aiming to offer innovative products and expand its reach.

data.title: GCI to Acquire Quintillion, Strengthening Alaska's Fiber Infrastructure
data.description: GCI Holdings, LLC, a subsidiary of GCI Liberty, Inc., and Grain Management, LLC recently revealed their collaboration to enhance reliability, resiliency, and performance through integrated networks. The announcement was made on April 22, 2026, in Anchorage, Alaska. GCI Liberty, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq as GLIBA and GLIBK. This partnership signifies a significant step towards improving connectivity and overall network functioning.

data.title: OFG Bancorp Analysts Raise Their Forecasts Following Upbeat Q1 Results
data.description: OFG Bancorp (NYSE: OFG) announced strong first-quarter earnings, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported earnings of $1.26 per share, exceeding the estimated $1.02 per share. Quarterly sales amounted to $185.800 million, surpassing the estimated $166.544 million. CEO José Rafael Fernández attributed the positive results to business momentum, strategic execution, balance sheet management, and core deposit strength. The company also highlighted ongoing loan growth, solid credit performance, and consistent franchise execution. Additionally, OFG repurchased $44.5 million worth of shares during the quarter. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: RapidScale Enables Streamlined Agentic AI Operations with Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise
data.description: A recently launched three-tiered solution is aiding companies in swiftly transitioning from testing to implementing scalable and secure AI applications. The initiative was introduced by RapidScale, a prominent enterprise services provider under Cox Business, headquartered in Raleigh, North Carolina. This offering is intended to facilitate the deployment of AI technologies effectively.

data.title: StandardAero to Provide Repair and Overhaul Support on MT7 Engine Powering U.S. Navy Ship to Shore Connector Hovercraft
data.description: StandardAero, a prominent aerospace engine aftermarket services provider, has established a long-term deal with Rolls-Royce to offer specific repair and overhaul assistance for the MT7 marine gas turbine engine at their Maryville, TN site. This engine propels the U.S. Navy's Ship to Shore Connector (SSC) vehicle. The agreement signifies a significant development in the aerospace industry as it solidifies support for a critical component of the Navy's fleet. This partnership underlines StandardAero's expertise in engine maintenance, repair, and overhaul services.

data.title: Sandhills Medical Appoints Amanda Duke as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In McBee, South Carolina, Sandhills Medical, a renowned Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC), has appointed Amanda Duke as Chief Executive Officer. With over 30 years in healthcare leadership, Duke, a former registered nurse, aims to enhance community access to quality healthcare. The South Carolina native is dedicated to implementing initiatives that will improve and broaden access to comprehensive and affordable healthcare services. Sandhills Medical is celebrated for its commitment to quality care and serves a significant number of patients in the region.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises On Trump Ceasefire; Tesla Earnings Due (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today's stock market saw a rise in the Dow Jones index following President Trump's extension of the U.S.-Iran ceasefire. Investor focus also turns to Tesla as their earnings report is scheduled to be released late in the day. The Dow Jones index increased by [number] points in response to the news, showing a positive trend in the market. Stay updated with live coverage on this developing situation and its impact on market movements.

data.title: Ashton Hall Signs as Global Brand Ambassador and Investor at Price.com to Scale Smarter Shopping
data.description: In Los Angeles, a technology company called Price.com has welcomed Ashton Hall as a new global brand ambassador and investor. This collaboration signifies a departure from typical influencer partnerships as Hall has acquired an equity stake in Price.com, highlighting a long-lasting commitment. The partnership emphasizes shared values of discipline, consistency, and practical decision-making, combining Hall's international influence with Price.com's expertise.

data.title: U.S. Retail Asking Rent Growth Moderates in the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, retail asking rent growth in the U.S. demonstrated a moderation, as per data from CoStar, a key provider of online real estate marketplaces and analytics in the property sector. During Q1 2026, the growth rate decreased to +1.9% year over year, continuing a decline that commenced in 2024. Despite this slowdown, U.S. retail fundamentals are generally strong, although there has been a slight increase in vacancy rates alongside a moderation in tenant sales growth.

data.title: Payroc Launches Bodega AI: An AI-Powered POS System for High-SKU Retail Businesses
data.description: Tingley Park, Illinois - Payroc, a prominent global payments ecosystem facilitating businesses in payment acceptance and commerce optimization, has unveiled the introduction of Bodega AI. This innovative solution is an AI-driven point-of-sale (POS) system tailored for high-SKU retail enterprises, including convenience stores, liquor stores, smoke shops, delis, and specialty retailers. Bodega AI caters to businesses handling a vast array of products with intricate pricing setups. The system merges integrated technologies to provide a seamless and efficient retail transaction experience. It offers precise transaction processing for businesses dealing with a large inventory range, promoting operational ease and customer satisfaction.

data.title: Xsolla to Showcase Global Commerce and Direct-to-Consumer Solutions at gamescom latam 2026 in São Paulo
data.description: In Los Angeles, Xsolla, a prominent video game commerce company, revealed their involvement in gamescom latam 2026, scheduled from April 29 to May 3 at Distrito Anhembi in São Paulo, Brazil. Xsolla intends to engage with developers, publishers, and partners in the Latin American gaming industry during the event. They aim to showcase their diverse range of commerce infrastructure tailored to assist game companies in worldwide launches, expansions, and monetization efforts.

data.title: Panago Rolls Out New Daiya Dairy-Free Cheese Across All Locations
data.description: Panago Pizza, located in Abbotsford, British Columbia, has recently announced an enhancement to its plant-based pizza offerings by introducing a new Daiya Dairy-Free cheese. This updated menu option is now accessible at all Panago Pizza locations across the country.

data.title: Render Networks Raises $20 Million AUD, Acquires mPower Innovations, and Extends Its System of Execution to Electric Infrastructure
data.description: A technology company based in Denver, Render Networks, has recently secured a funding of $20 million in Australian dollars. The company has also acquired mPower Innovations and expanded its capabilities to include electric infrastructure.
Augmentum Fintech Plc reports Form 8.3.

data.title: NeuReality Research Shows AI Networking Efficiency Can Cut Data Center Emissions by 200 Tons of CO₂ Per Rack Annually
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, NeuReality, a leading company in specialized AI inference infrastructure, unveiled a new study titled "Why Scaling AI Breaks Your Network." The research highlights the potential of enhancing networking efficiency within AI systems to notably lower data center carbon emissions. This emphasizes the importance of network optimization as a key factor for sustainable large-scale AI operations. Released on Earth Day 2026, the report underscores inefficient data transfer across dispersed systems as a significant contributor.
Uni-Fuels releases audited FY2025 results, showing 70% revenue growth and expanding worldwide operations.

data.title: Avangrid CEO Jose Antonio Miranda Speaks at U.S. Hispanic Chamber of Commerce Energy Summit
data.description: The CEO of Avangrid discussed the company's investments in advancing energy affordability at the U.S. Hispanic Chamber of Commerce Energy Summit in Santa Fe, New Mexico.
